home_eggs_description: Orchard-raised hens, fed on ginger and herbs and never rushed — eggs gathered by hand every morning. They even come running to a bell at feeding time, a bit of Pavlov we couldn't resist.
home_veggies_description: Just kangkung for now, with more greens to come as the soil's ready.
home_fruits_description: Durian, papaya and java apple — we treat every tree as its own living thing. One ripens this week, another the next; we never harvest the whole orchard at once, and the durians especially we let arrive in their own time.
home_eggs_order_message: Hi Our Little Farm! I'd like to order {quantity} trays of eggs.
home_feed_teaser: See what the animals are saying
home_story_heading: From our soil to your table
home_story_body: Our Little Farm isn't a poultry shed, and it never will be. Our hens live out in the orchard, under the fruit trees, scratching wherever they please. What began with a few birds and a stretch of red Mantin earth has grown into something closer to an ecosystem than a farm — the chickens feed the soil, the soil feeds the trees, and the trees feed us. The idea hasn't changed: love the land, and it loves you back. We've watched tired, lifeless ground turn rich and fertile under that one simple promise. No shortcuts, no rushing the seasons — just honest food, grown the slow way, by people who'd happily share a pot of tea with you at the gate.
home_promise_heading: Grown the way it should be
home_promise_1_body: Low-stress birds raised on ginger, turmeric, garlic and herbs, with a calm daily routine and a lot of attention. Welfare first, always.
home_promise_2_body: We listen to each tree and harvest only what's truly ready — never the whole orchard at once.
home_promise_3_body: The chickens feed the soil, the soil feeds the trees. Nothing here goes to waste.
home_visit_body: You'll find us down a quiet lane in Mantin, Negeri Sembilan. Mornings are best — the eggs are still warm and the kettle's usually on. Bring a basket. Our hens, geese and ducks are a friendly bunch, so we're dreaming up little farm visits for kids before long.
home_latest_empty: The coop's quiet right now — be the first to make some noise.
posts_op_tooltip: Posted by an Our Little Farm owner
posts_empty: The coop's quiet here — nothing to show yet.
posts_load_error: Couldn't load the farm. Try again.
